news.t: Invesco Continues to Expand Active Fixed Income Line-Up to Meet Investor Needs

overview.description: The Invesco Core Fixed Income ETF (GTOC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed core bond ETF, seeking total return opportunities. The fund aims to manage a diversified portfolio of US investment-grade fixed income securities of various maturities. GTOC was launched on Jul 23, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco Continues to Expand Active Fixed Income Line-Up to Meet Investor Needs
data.text: ATLANTA, July 23, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), a leading global asset management firm, today announced the ongoing expansion of its active fixed income platform through the launch of...
